calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-14-2005 Continued To Apr-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-18-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Teena Paxton.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: John Stewart Company, a California corp.
Plaintiff's witness: Lois Butler, also present.
Defendant: John Fredericks, present in pro per.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Parties stipulated and agreed that Judgment may be entered for Plaintiff the restitution and possession of the premises located at 2176 Mission St., #221, San Francisco, stayed of execution until April 29, 2005, no rent due, any security deposit shall be retained by the Plaintiff, rental agreement declared forfeited, any personal property left after April 29, 2005, shall be stored by the Plaintiff for 30 days, no other person claims the right to possession, parties mutually release each other from all claims.
If Defendant vacates the premises as agreed and prepares all documents necessary to vacate Judgment, then Plaintiff agreed to file dimissal with prejudice.
Parties agreed to terms, Judgment pursuant to stipulation in open court, filed in court.
Matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Rossoff for Plaintiff John Stewart Comapny, no appearance by defendant

Off calendar. Jury demand stricken. Court trial confirmed.

Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk, Don Feinberg
